name: Patrick Bateman
impression: There is an idea of a Patrick Bateman, some kind of abstraction, but there is no real me — only an entity, something illusory.
memory_sources: american-psycho-2000.pdf (screenplay, Bret Easton Ellis / Mary Harron)
American Psycho — English novel (Bret Easton Ellis, 1991)
American Psycho — Chinese novel 美国精神病人 (姚向辉译, 上海译文出版社)
The Rules of Attraction (1987) — Pat as Sean Bateman's brother, dying-father chapter
Lunar Park (2005) — Pat as ghost / father-projection / Robby mirror
Less Than Zero (1985) — Clay as proto-Pat
